I am a representative who leads international missions.
Sebrae is an institution that supports small businesses.
Milan is the city where the event takes place.
Good morning. I am Marco, from the Italian delegation. Nice to meet you.
Good morning, Marco. My name is Flavia. I am a representative of Sebrae, an institution that supports small businesses.
Interesting. Where is your headquarters?
Our headquarters is in Brazil, but we work with partners in many countries.
And what does Sebrae offer, exactly?
We offer a portfolio of programs that helps small companies grow. Sebrae has a strong reputation in this sector.
I would like to explore an affiliation between our two groups.
It is a pleasure to meet a partner who shares our vision. Let me explain the protocol for a bilateral project.
Good morning. My name is Flavia, and I am a representative of Sebrae.
Our headquarters is in Brazil, but we work in many countries.
It is a pleasure to meet a partner who shares our vision.
I would like to talk about a possible affiliation between our groups.

Good morning. My name is Flavia, and it is a pleasure to be here in Milan. I am a representative of Sebrae, which is an institution that supports small businesses in Brazil. Our headquarters is in Brazil, but we work with partners in many countries. We offer a portfolio of programs that helps small companies grow, and Sebrae has a strong reputation in this sector. I am here to meet partners who share our vision, and to talk about a possible affiliation between our groups. Thank you very much.

Good morning. Here is one simple tip for a strong first impression at an international event. First, keep your introduction short and clear. Say your name and your role: I am a representative of my organization. Second, describe your organization in one sentence. Use a relative clause: we are an institution that supports small businesses. Third, open a connection. Say, it is a pleasure to meet a partner who shares our vision. A calm, formal introduction opens every door. Good luck!

First, Flavia introduces herself and says, my name is Flavia, and I am a representative of Sebrae. Then, she describes her organization and says, Sebrae is an institution that supports small businesses. Next, she talks about the portfolio of programs that Sebrae offers. After that, a man from an Italian delegation asks about a possible affiliation. Finally, she explains the protocol for a bilateral project and opens a new connection.
